items.title: Member Support Discovery Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve member intent routing, recommendation quality, and first-session conversion into meaningful support.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeat member engagement by making the right next action easier to find.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time to first meaningful support interaction
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce friction between opening Cadre and getting help.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve short-term retention through stronger product usefulness.

productBricks.change: Improve intent-aware home composition and recovery modules.
Improve recommendation quality for live, community, and content support.
Improve explicit-intent search and topic retrieval.

deliveryChannels.change: Release improved iOS member discovery flows.
Release improved Android member discovery flows.

items.title: Employer Launch and Reporting Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to reduce employer launch friction, improve admin workflows, and make aggregate account-health reporting more actionable.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase workforce activation through better onboarding and launch readiness.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve employer renewal confidence through stronger first-quarter outcomes.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase participation by giving admins better tools and signals.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of healthy employer accounts after launch.

productBricks.change: Improve launch checklists, access-code management, and readiness state.
Improve admin workflows and quarterly review views.
Improve aggregate health and activation reporting.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated employer admin console experience.

items.title: Contributor Trust and Delivery Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve contributor profile quality, live session operations, moderation support, and payout clarity.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve contributor trust in live delivery and moderation.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce contributor churn caused by operational friction.

productBricks.change: Improve contributor onboarding and profile readiness.
Improve session host controls and delivery reliability.
Improve earnings visibility and payout accuracy workflows.
